rows.notes: P70 runs only after P69 lands the repo-graph hygiene inventory.
P70 preserves the current green preflight and archive-ready posture.
P70 should run only from the current hygiene-only cleanup branch.
The planning index should expose the current hygiene-only cleanup design and next handoff surfaces.
The publication router should surface the current hygiene-only cleanup stack explicitly.
The submission packet index should expose the current archive-facing cleanup helpers alongside H65.
The archival manifest should record the current cleanup sidecars without changing the paper-facing endpoint facts.
The artifact policy doc should keep the standing local-only / explicit-LFS-only rule explicit.
The raw-row ignore rules should remain active in .gitignore.
The current clean descendant should not track artifacts at or above roughly 10 MiB.
